items.title: Segway extends Prime Day savings on EVs for up to 58% off, like the all-terrain ZT3 Pro e-scooter at $850 + more from $250
items.summary:
Update 6/29: Segway has extended its Prime Day EV Sale through July 5th, and any price changes have been adjusted below.

Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day Sale event, Segway has launched its expanded Prime Day deals with up to 58% discounts on EVs. One model that saw a greater price cut from the pre-sale deals is Segway’s ZT3 Pro All-Terrain Electric Scooter down at $849.99 $799.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing over at Amazon. Despite carrying a direct $1,300 MSRP, you can often find it going for $1,000 at most these days, with discounts having mostly dropped the price to $850 in 2026. While it did drop down to $773 a single time in January, you’re otherwise looking at the best price we have tracked with the $200 savings here ($500 off the MSRP). Head below to check out the full lineup of deals while they last – especially the amazing new extra battery bundle and low prices we’re seeing on the brand’s e-bikes.

items.title: Jackery’s Independence Day Sale drops the new 3,584Wh HomePower 3600 Pro Max power station to $1,745, more from $249
items.summary: Jackery has launched its Independence Day Sale in celebration of America’s upcoming birthday with up to 60% discounts on its power stations – plus, three varying extra savings codes for orders of $1,500 or more. Continuing its inclusion since releasing ahead of the previous Prime Day Sale is the latest HomePower 3600 Pro Max Portable Power Station down at $1,745.03 shipped, after using the code OFFER3 at checkout, beating its Amazon pricing by $1,254, where it’s keeping to a $2,999 full price. We previously saw it get first discounts during Prime Day last week, where it was marked down to $1,714 directly and $1,699 at Amazon. If you missed out then, you’re getting the third-best price here with $1,254 savings, or you can head below to browse the full sale lineup while it lasts through July 4.

items.title: Upgrade backyard get togethers with Ninja’s FlexFlame ProConnect 5-in-1 grill & smoker at its $1,100 low
items.summary: We’re seeing a bunch of deals continuing over from last week’s Prime Day event, and one such deal is on the Ninja FlexFlame ProConnect Grill & Smoker down at $1,099.99 shipped. Normally $1,300 since hitting the market in February, we’ve seen three previous discounts to this same low price in the time since, with Prime Day giving us the fourth of these $200 markdowns, continuing now at the all-time lowest tracked price for a while longer. That’s not all, as you can find a number of other ongoing deals on Ninja’s appliances, coolers, and more in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Get Microsoft Office for life for only $30 (Up to $220 value)
items.summary: Microsoft 365 keeps charging until you tell it to stop. Microsoft Office Pro 2021 for Windows is a one-time purchase that bypasses the whole renewal loop, and a lifetime license is on sale right now for $29.97 (reg. $219.99). That’s less than what Microsoft 365 charges for a single calendar year, and the suite never expires, but this sale ends June 28.

items.title: The Worx Nitro 20V 8-inch cordless electric pole saw with 13.3-feet of reach is keeping to its $120 Prime Day rate
items.summary: Amazon is continuing its Prime Day pricing on the Worx Nitro 20V 8-inch Cordless Electric Pole Saw with 2.0Ah battery for $119.99 shipped. Normally climbing as high as $153 in 2026, discounts have dropped the costs over the last six months between $140 and $119, while there was a one-day deal in May to score it at the $110 low. The deal here began halfway through Prime Day and is continuing on for an unknown amount of time, giving you $33 savings and landing it just $10 above the low.

items.title: Pair your standing desk with this ergonomic drafting chair for $100 (Reg. $140)
items.summary:
Marsail Ergonomic Drafting Chair

Buy for $100 (Reg. $140)

What we love

If you’re rocking a standing desk and want a chair that can handle taller heights, a drafting chair is certainly worth considering. This unit kicks fabric to the curb, leaving you with a wipeable surface that won’t stain very easily.

items.title: Acer delivers a metal unibody design, 4K resolution, and 1/2-inch Sony sensor in this webcam for just $34 (Reg. $60)
items.summary:
Acer 4K Metal Unibody Webcam

Buy for $34 (Reg. $60)

What we love

Outfitted with a 1/2-inch Sony sensor, metal unibody design, and 4K resolution, there’s a lot to like about this webcam from Acer. Perhaps even more notable is the price here, you’re looking at just $34 Prime shipped.

items.title: Get cables out of sight with this 20-foot 3-4 cord cover kit down at $22
items.summary:
Delamu 20-Foot 3-4 Cord Cover Kit

Buy for $22 (Reg. $37)

What we love

If you have several places in your home where you want to hide cords, you might as well grab a large kit like this and you’ll likely be able to tackle it all in one go. There’s roughly 20 feet of coverage here, and it can cover 3-4 cables too.

items.title: This MagSafe desk pad tops off your iPhone and AirPods, now $30 (Reg. $60)
items.summary:
Miroddi Large MagSafe Desk Pad

Buy for $30 (Reg. $60)

What we love

I like to keep my iPhone and AirPods within reach when I’m at my desk. This desk pad gives you dedicated places that even top them off. One of which supports MagSafe, making it easy to snap your iPhone in place.
